query: Suno AI v5.5 release new features March 26 2026 official changelog

{"query":"Suno AI v5.5 release new features March 26 2026 official changelog","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1885,"verdict":null,"extra_info":{"type":"featured_snippet","text":"AI music generator Suno released version 5.5 of its platform on Friday (March 27), introducing a voice capture feature and two personalization tools that the company says are aimed at attracting first-time creators and working professionals.Mar 30, 2026"},"results":[{"url":"https://www.musicbusinessworldwide.com/suno-launches-v5-5-ai-model-with-voice-capture-and-personalization-features/#:~:text=AI%20music%20generator%20Suno%20released,time%20creators%20and%20working%20professionals.","title":"Suno launches v5.5 AI model with voice cloning tool: ‘The best music starts with a human.’ - Music Business Worldwide","content":"AI music generator Suno released version 5.5 of its platform on Friday (March 27), introducing a voice capture feature and two personalization tools that the company says are aimed at attracting first-time creators and working professionals.
Another new feature, ‘Custom Models’, lets subscribers upload tracks from their own catalog and tune v5.5 to reflect their personal styles.
Suno says it learns what users are drawn to, such as their favorite genres and moods.
Udio has since reached settlements with both Universal Music Group and Warner Music Group, signing licensing agreements with each for a new AI music platform expected to launch this year.
Suno, which closed a $250 million Series C funding round in November 2025 at a $2.45 billion post-money valuation, reported in February that it has reached 2 million paid subscribers and $300 million in annual recurring revenue."},{"url":"https://suno.com/blog/v5-5","title":"Suno v5.5: More Expressive. More You. · Suno","content":"Today we're releasing Suno v5.5 — our best and most expressive model yet — alongside features that let you showcase your musical identity on Suno: Voices, Custom models, and My Taste.
This update also reflects something we're seeing more and more: artists, producers, and music professionals are using Suno as part of their creative process. v5.5 was built with them in mind because we believe the best version of Suno is one that works for anyone who makes music, from first-time creators to working professionals.
Alongside Voices, we're launching two more ways to make Suno feel like yours: Custom Models and My Taste.
My Taste is a different kind of personalization."},{"url":"https://help.suno.com/en/articles/11362305","title":"What’s New in v5.5","content":"As always, when we are ready to share a new model, we believe it represents a substantial change for the better. v5.5 is no different; we think this model is the most expressive model yet, with the most personalized characteristics ever."},{"url":"https://www.digitalmusicnews.com/2026/03/26/suno-launches-version-5-5/","title":"Suno Launches Version 5.5 With New 'Voices' Feature","content":"The first new feature is the launch of Voices, which will be available to Suno Pro and Premier subscribers.
Suno says in the future it plans on adding Voice sharing, but that aspect of this new feature remains on the horizon.
Pro and Premier subscribers can create up to three custom models for now.
This is the only feature that is part of the 5.5 model release today that is available to everyone.
Suno is rolling out version 5.5 of its model just as Google rolls out its latest AI music system, Lyria 3 Pro.
Lyria 3 Pro is part of Google’s DeepMind division’s AI suite, which promises more detail instrumental rendering and dynamic control tailored for artists and producers.
The back-to-back launches underscore the intensifying competition between AI companies, each vying to define the creative tools that are shaping AI-assisted music production."},{"url":"https://jackrighteous.com/en-us/blogs/guides-using-suno-ai-music-creation/suno-v5-5-features-explained-workflow-changes-studio-editing-creator-guide","title":"Suno v5.5 Features Explained: Workflow Changes, Studio Editing & Creat – Jack Righteous","content":"What this confirms: even before you argue about v5.5 specifically, Suno’s official direction already points toward layered, after-the-fact refinement rather than a one-shot music generator.
The cleanest official documentation currently supports v5 and the editor workflow around it."}]}

tavily.raw:
{"query":"Suno AI v5.5 release new features March 26 2026 official changelog","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=eVlFcpX1VGA","title":"Suno v5.5 is Here: Make Music With YOUR Voice & Custom Models!","content":"Suno v5.5 is Here: Make Music With YOUR Voice & Custom Models!
Suno Music
316000 subscribers
8295 likes
248509 views
26 Mar 2026
Welcome to Suno v5.5! This is our best sounding model yet, but more importantly, it is our most personalized model. Sign up for Suno here: https://suno.com/?utm_source=Social&utm_medium=YTSF&utm_campaign=Voices

We built v5.5 around the idea that the music you create should carry something of you: your voice, your sound, and your taste. In this full tutorial, Luke Conard breaks down three brand new features that give you the most expressive Suno experience to date:

🎤 Voices (Beta) You can finally make music with your own voice on Suno! We walk you through how to record or upload your audio to capture your voice. We’ve built in strict verification to ensure you stay in control, and your Voices are completely private and only accessible to you. (Note: During the beta, we’ve reduced the cost of using Voices to just 4 credits per creation!)

🎛️ Custom Models
Upload your own catalog of music or raw audio files to create a special version of the v5.5 model that is all about your signature sound. You can build a custom model with as few as 6 tracks (or up to albums' worth of audio!) to perfectly capture your unique musical aesthetic.

✨ My Taste
Suno is learning to speak your musical language. My Taste captures your creative preferences, go-to styles, and songwriting traits to build a personalized magic wand. The more you create, the more it gets your taste.

Voices and Custom Models are available right now for Pro and Premier subscribers, and My Taste is available to everyone on Suno.

Chapters:
00:00 - Welcome to Suno v5.5
00:34 - Introducing Voices
01:11 - How to Capture Your Voice
02:57 - Verification & Privacy
03:56 - Creating a Song with Your Voice
06:28 - Introducing Custom Models
07:05- How to Train a Custom Model
08:54 - Using Your Custom Model
10:03 - Custom Model vs. V5 Model
11:04 - My Taste (Personalized Magic Wand)
11:48 - Where did Personas go? (Voices Beta Info)

Hosted by: Luke Conard

#Suno #SunoAI #AIMusic #SunoV5 #MusicProduction #VoiceCapture #CustomModels #MusicTech #AI #CreatorTools

It’s about making those beats unmistakably, undeniably *you*.**. On March 26, 2026, Suno quietly dropped version 5.5 of its AI music model, and it’s not what anyone expected. The company calls it “our best and most expressive model yet,” and for once, that’s not just marketing fluff. V5.5 introduces three brand-new features: **Voices**, **Custom Models**, and **My Taste**. They’re pointing toward a future where AI music isn’t just *generated*, it’s *personalized*. It lets you train Suno’s vocal model on your own voice. To use the Voices feature, you don’t just upload audio and call it a day. The idea is simple: upload at least six tracks from your own music, give the custom model a name, and Suno builds a personalized version of v5.5 that knows your style.","score":0.8834878,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://suno.bi/en/blog/suno-v5-5-voices-custom-models-my-taste-guide-2026","title":"Suno v5.5 Guide: Voices, Custom Models & My Taste Explained (2026) | SunoMV Blog","content":"# Suno v5.5 Guide: Voices, Custom Models & My Taste Explained (2026). # Suno v5.5 Complete Guide: Voices, Custom Models & My Taste Explained (2026). In March 2026, Suno officially launched v5.5 (official announcement), shipping the three most-requested features from its community: **Voices** (verified voice cloning), **Custom Models** (personal fine-tuned models), and **My Taste** (a personalization engine). This guide covers three things: what each feature actually does, how to use them inside SunoMV, and how v5.5 stacks up against Google’s Lyria 3 Pro, released the same week. ## What is Suno v5.5? SunoMV positions itself as “the MV layer on top of Suno” — once you’ve generated a song with your Voices on Suno’s own platform, paste the song URL into SunoMV for an instant music video with synced lyrics:. In the SunoMV generation page, the model picker shows **Suno V5.5 – Custom Models, Voices & My Taste** (Pro tier).","score":0.83742094,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://help.suno.com/en/articles/11362305","title":"What’s New in v5.5","content":"# What’s New in v5.5. Now when you create songs in v5.5, you get to put more of *you* into your music. An evolution of Personas (which captures the essence of a song and allows you to recall style elements), Voices also captures the essence of *your* voice so you can finally hear what **you** sound like in your Suno songs. For singers, you can demo new songs with Voices without having to set up a mic or be in a Studio. For non-singers, you’ll now be able to hear your own voice in your songs, maybe even for the first time. The result is a personalized version of the model that sounds more like you.","score":0.780947,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://suno.com/blog/v5-5","title":"Suno v5.5: More Expressive. As we announced last year, we’re opening a new chapter in music creation, in partnership with artists and the music business. The capabilities we're putting in place today — voice fidelity, personalized sound, custom models — lay the foundation for the next generation of music models we're launching with the music industry later this year. From the beginning, we've built Suno around a simple belief: the best music starts with a human. v5.5 is our deepest expression of that belief so far, a model that doesn't just help create music, but fully reflects the person making it. v5.5 was built with them in mind  because we believe the best version of Suno is one that works for anyone who makes music, from first-time creators to working professionals.
